ddls:
CREATE TABLE "marine_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "x" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the grid cell center */,
  "y" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the grid cell center */,
  "sigma_novelty" REAL /* Measure of biodiversity novelty */,
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the grid cell */,
  "eez_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Exclusive Economic Zone (EEZ) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., marine biodiversity, water quality) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data point */,
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metadata associated with the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_data_cell_id FOREIGN KEY ("cell_id") REFERENCES grid_cells ("cell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_data_eez_id FOREIGN KEY ("eez_id") REFERENCES exclusive_economic_zones ("eez_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_data_metadata_id FOREIGN KEY ("metadata_id") REFERENCES metadata ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_cells" (
  "cell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid cell */,
  "cell_name" TEXT /* Name of the grid cell */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the grid cell */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the grid cell */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average depth of the grid cell */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem in the grid cell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exclusive_economic_zones" (
  "eez_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EEZ */,
  "eez_name" TEXT /* Name of the EEZ */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the EEZ */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the EEZ */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of data collection in the EEZ */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of data collection in the EEZ */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the EEZ (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("eez_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for metadata */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
